name: Maple Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dried Navy pea beans or yellow beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and add cold water. Cover and let soak overnight.
2. Add salt to the beans and liquid mixture, then simmer gently until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Drain the beans, reserving the liquid.
4. Measure 1-3/4 cups of bean liquid. If necessary, add water.
5. Cut a slice from the salt pork and place it in the bottom of the bean pot.
6. Add beans; place the onion in the center of the beans.
7. Mix mustard, sugar, molasses, and maple syrup with the bean liquid; pour over the beans.
8. Cut 3 gashes in the remaining salt pork, placing it rind side up on top of the beans.
9. Cover and bake for 5 to 7 hours in a 300°F oven, adding more water as needed.
10. Remove the cover from the bean pot during the last half hour so the pork rind will brown and become crisp.
